numbering_note: Brief said UX7-N; repo's highest existing dir is ux-review-9, so highest-N+1 convention gives review 10 / UX10-N.

findings.title: WDT reboots during ordinary UI use (3 in one session)
findings.screen: instrument editor (Remove confirm) / Apps > Keyboard / System > Settings
findings.repro: 1) confirm modal up + tulip.screenshot() flash write -> Core 1 'Guru Meditation Error: Core 1 panic'ed (Interrupt wdt timeout on CPU1)', ISR context; 2) Apps Keyboard tile -> orphan keyboard -> WDT within ~15s, host port closed (no serial involvement); 3) Settings tap -> rst:0x8 TG1WDT_SYS_RST, both CPUs, intermittent (1 of 3 opens).
findings.fix: Top-priority firmware bug. Start from crash #2 (clean user-reachable repro); audit overlay-up core work + draw recursion; extend flash-write quiet gate to cover writes while overlays render.

findings.title: Apps > Keyboard tile opens orphan keyboard bypassing kbmgr; preceded crash #2
findings.repro: Tap Keyboard tile (home.py _APPS wires tulip.keyboard raw). ui.lv_soft_kb True, kbmgr.is_open() False, no textarea bound; keys go to tulip.key_send (REPL under UI); nav guards can't close it; WDT followed in ~15s.
findings.fix: Remove the tile from the deck Apps grid (or route through kbmgr with an explicit target).

findings.title: Zombie keyboard stays painted after tab-switch close in Settings
findings.screen: Settings, tab switch with keyboard up
findings.repro: Focus Wi-Fi password -> keyboard up -> tap Display tab. Keyboard object deleted (tree clean) but pixels persist 60+s; taps hit invisible widgets underneath. lv.screen_active().invalidate() clears it.
findings.fix: kbmgr._hide_overlay(): invalidate the vacated rect/screen once after tulip.keyboard() teardown.

findings.title: Patch picker stuck in collapsed layout after keyboard's own hide key
findings.repro: Open search keyboard (collapse ok) -> close via keyboard-glyph hide key -> header stays hidden, list stays ~300px, bottom half dead. instrument._layout_list only fires from panel kb button / ta focus events.
findings.fix: Add a close-listener hook to kbmgr (_teardown_binding tail); picker registers relayout; Settings can reuse for UX10-3.

findings.title: Password field hidden under the echo strip while typing
findings.repro: Focus password field: kbmgr scrolls to clear the keyboard top (300px) but not the 34px echo strip above it; field left ~20px visible; eye button half covered.
findings.fix: _ensure_visible: clearance line = kb_top - echo_height - margin when the strip is shown.

findings.title: Reset patch wipes sound-design edits with no confirm and no feedback
findings.repro: Tap Reset patch: params/reverb_send/hits/hit_swaps cleared instantly; layer_top empty (no confirm/toast, verified on-device).
findings.fix: dk.confirm gate (exists) + completion toast, mirroring Remove instrument.

findings.title: Keyboard checkmark (OK) key is dead
findings.repro: Press the check key: ui.lv_soft_kb_cb has no SYMBOL.OK branch, nothing listens for READY; keyboard stays up, no commit signal.
evidence: on-device: kb still open after OK press

findings.title: Eye toggle doesn't refresh the echo strip until next keystroke
findings.repro: Toggle eye: field unmasks, echo keeps bullets; next keystroke repaints cleartext.
evidence: on-device: pwmode False + echo bullets, then 'xyz' after keystroke

findings.title: Debug tiles (Profiler/Logs) don't appear until Settings reopened
findings.repro: Debug ON -> no new rows until leaving Settings and reopening the tab; no hint they exist.
findings.fix: Rebuild the System tab page on toggle (or append rows live), or mention tiles in the switch subtitle.

findings.title: Debug status-bar readout lingers after Debug off
findings.repro: Debug off 19:55; 'WDT py 9238K int 41K' still painted 19:57+. Cleared only by reboot.
findings.fix: _debug_switch(False) path must clear/hide the readout label explicitly.

findings.title: Sound editor forgets active tab on Basic/Advanced switch
findings.repro: VCF tab -> tap Advanced -> lands on DCO.
findings.fix: Carry active tab index across the view rebuild.

findings.title: Disabled nav buttons look enabled (MPE Per-note expression)
findings.repro: Edit > button has DISABLED state but paints like enabled; sliders in same panel do gray out.
findings.fix: Flat DISABLED colors for dk.button (same treatment dk.switch got).

findings.title: boot.py Wi-Fi join dies on stray ^C, stranding deck at REPL
findings.repro: KeyboardInterrupt during tulip.wifi() escapes 'except Exception' (not a subclass) -> boot.py aborts -> bare REPL until manual reboot. Observed live after crash #2.
findings.fix: except BaseException around the join (log + continue), or micropython.kbd_intr(-1) during boot.

findings.title: Home root status line duplicates the rack row
findings.repro: 'Tulip  A11 Brass Set 1 | vol 1' under a row+footer already showing the same info.
findings.fix: Drop it or add non-duplicate info (IP, clock-sync, free channel).

findings.title: Protected-file Delete disabled without explanation
findings.repro: Select amyfleet.py: Delete disabled, status line shows only the filename.

findings.title: Profiler load bar renders as a dot at low %
findings.repro: 5-7% fills draw as a circle (fill width < corner radius).
findings.fix: Clamp minimum fill width or reduce radius.

findings.title: Interrupted boots leave half-entries in deck.log
findings.repro: Crash #2 boot logged only the '=== deck boot ===' line (boot.py died before the second line).
findings.fix: Doc-only: a lone boot line means boot did not finish.

passed: kbmgr echo strip: typing/backspace tracking, masked echo, last-char reveal + 1.2s re-mask, no reveal on backspace/mode switch
kbmgr structural guard: Back/tab-switch with keyboard up never crashed; state resets fully; close idempotent; 4x rapid toggle stable
patch search live filter + collapsed header + field lift
files two-tap delete, disarm on selection change, protected-module guard, disabled action buttons
devices panel, FX editor, presets empty state, MIDI monitor pause/resume, profiler/logs debug panels, type selector
not_covered: Terminal/REPL app switch, Calibrate, Editor/Wordpad/Tulip World
screensaver firing, live MIDI decode, audio-audible checks
drums/synthkit pad editor + kit picker, preset save flow
Wi-Fi Connect, firmware Upgrade/Safe update, Factory reset (forbidden)
per-key redraw visual confirmation (transient; needs video/eyeball)

crashes_verbatim.crash1_guru: Guru Meditation Error: Core  1 panic'ed (Interrupt wdt timeout on CPU1). / Core  1 was running in ISR context: / EXCCAUSE: 0x00000006 / Backtrace: ...0x42012a5f:0x3fce6870 0x4201a309... (repeating) / ELF file SHA256: f151f4dba / Rebooting... / rst:0xc (RTC_SW_CPU_RST)
crashes_verbatim.crash2_decklog: [1532] === deck boot === reset_cause=WDT (no 'boot: reset cause' follow-up: boot killed by ^C -> KeyboardInterrupt at boot.py:148/_boot:73/tulip.py:388 wifi)
crashes_verbatim.crash3_banner: rst:0x8 (TG1WDT_SYS_RST) / W (38) boot.esp32s3: PRO CPU has been reset by WDT. / W (38) boot.esp32s3: APP CPU has been reset by WDT. / DECKLOG [1549] === deck boot === reset_cause=WDT / [10942] boot: reset cause WDT

restoration.config: deck_config.json restored byte-for-byte, sha8 fc0804c0, then soft reboot
